The '''[[Wigan Warriors]]''' play [[Rugby League]] in [[Wigan]], [[England]]. Their 2012 season results in the [[Super League XVII]] and [[2012 Challenge Cup]] are shown below.

==Challenge Cup==
{{main|2012 Challenge Cup}}
After finishing second in the [[Super League XVI]], Wigan Warriors entered the [[2012 Challenge Cup]] at the fourth round. Their opening game saw them thrash [[North Wales Crusaders]] by 94 points. A win in the fifth round against [[Featherstone Rovers]] saw them beat [[Good Friday derby|derby]] rivals [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] in the quarter-finals before losing to their other rivals, [[Leeds Rhinos]], in the semi-finals.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2012/jul/14/leeds-rhinos-wigan-warriors-challenge-cup|title=Leeds Rhinos 39-28 Wigan Warriors | Challenge Cup semi-final report|first=Andy Wilson at the Galpharm|last=Stadium|work=The Guardian |date=14 July 2012|via=www.theguardian.com}}</ref>
